games.name: Harbor Breakout
games.description: Harbor Breakout is a fast-paced top-down action escape game where every second counts. Control a speed boat and navigate through a closing harbor filled with enemy patrols, floating mines and tight passages. Choose your difficulty and react fast as obstacles become denser and enemies more aggressive over time. One mistake ends the run. No story, no distractions &amp;mdash; just pure movement, pressure and skill-based arcade action designed for quick and replayable sessions.
games.instructions: Steer your speed boat through a dangerous harbor avoid mines and escape enemy patrols Choose your difficulty and survive as long as possible in nonstop action

games.name: Stickman Stack Race
games.description: Lead your stickman crowd, crush obstacles, and dominate the streets in Stickman Stack Race! Choose the right gates, gather warriors, and multiply your team to beat rival crowds. Collect coins, upgrade your stickmen, and race through crowded city streets toward the ultimate battle. Face the King-stickman in the final clash and claim the castle! With bright 3D graphics, simple controls, and addictive stacking action, Stickman Stack Race offers endless fun, strategy, and thrills. Become the ultimate crowd master and rule the race!

games.name: Halo Run
games.description: Halo Run is a fast-paced reflex game set on an endless circular track where survival depends on perfect timing. Run endlessly around the halo and leap over incoming obstacles before they collide with you&amp;mdash;one mistake and the run is over. The challenge intensifies as speed increases and obstacles appear closer together, pushing your reaction time to the limit. Every jump must be precise, every move calculated. Simple controls make it easy to play, but mastering the rhythm takes skill and focus.
games.instructions: Make the bar jump at the right time

games.description: Spectral Seek is a mysterious object-finding game set inside a haunted mansion filled with secrets, shadows, and whispers from the past. Explore eerie rooms and forgotten halls as you search for hidden objects scattered throughout the mansion. Each level challenges your observation skills, blending spooky atmosphere with clever hiding spots. The deeper you venture, the trickier the finds become, testing your focus and attention to detail. Every discovered object brings you closer to uncovering the mansion&amp;rsquo;s secrets.

Collect three matching items to clear them from your basket. Race against the clock through 6 unique themed levels: Meadow, Garden, Farm, Ocean, Market, and Festival. Each level unlocks after completing the previous one. Can you conquer all pyramids?

games.description: 2048 is a simple yet incredibly addictive puzzle game that challenges your logic, planning, and reflexes. The goal is straightforward: slide numbered tiles across a 4&amp;times;4 grid to combine matching numbers and create increasingly larger values. Your ultimate mission is to reach the legendary 2048 tile, but the real challenge is keeping the board from filling up before you get there.
